content:
MODULE: cosmos.agents.browser.agent
FILE: cosmos/agents/browser/agent.py (248 lines)
CATEGORY: agents

DESCRIPTION: Cosmos Browser Agent.

Autonomous browser agent for web tasks using browser-use.

CLASSES:
- BrowserResult: Result of a browser task.
- CosmosBrowserAgent: Autonomous browser agent for web tasks.

Uses browser-use library with Playwrigh
  Methods: async def execute_task(self, task: str) -> BrowserResult
  Methods: async def navigate_and_extract(self, url: str, extraction_prompt: str) -> Dict[str, Any]
  Methods: async def fill_form(self, url: str, form_data: Dict[str, str], submit: bool=False) -> BrowserResult
  Methods: async def take_screenshot(self, url: str) -> bytes
  Methods: async def close(self)
